description: Binary C1-C4 mixture at conditions known to give two-phase behavior

expected.notes: Verified with PVT-SIM PR EOS. C1 strongly prefers vapor (K~5.9), C4 prefers liquid (K~0.035).

validation_notes: At 250K and 20 bar: T < Tc_C1 (190.6K) is FALSE, T < Tc_C4 (425K) is TRUE. This is in the two-phase region for this composition.
